sections.paragraph: m. (from the root קוּר), a fountain. מְקֹור חַיִּים the fountain of life, of welfare, Psa 36:10. מְקֹור דָּמִים the fountain of blood, per euphem. de pudendis mulieris, Lev 12:7 20:18 also without דָּמִים Lev 20:18. Figuratively, Psa 68:27, מִמְּקֹור יִשְׂרָאֵל “(ye) of the fountain of Israel,” i.e. descendants of Israel; compare מַיִם Isa 48:1.
